creator: joehorn@gmail.com
text:
As we see in
http://sourceforge.net/projects/simplehtmldom/files/simplehtmldom/ , and
the changelog .
I think the the port intended to go 1.5 from 1.11 .

I know the change of version number will make problem when user doing
upgrade.
Therefore, I bumped PORTEPOCH .

2012/1/5 Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@freebsd.org>

> Thanks for the patch, another question, is this port intended to go 1.5
> from 1.11?
>
> On Thu, Jan 05, 2012 at 10:25:46 +0800, Joe Horn wrote:
> > Sorry, here is the correct one.
> >
> > 2012/1/5 Joe Horn <joehorn@gmail.com>
> >
> > > Excuse me.
> > > Here is the new patch file.
> > >
> > > 2012/1/5 <lwhsu@freebsd.org>
> > >
> > > Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] textproc/simplehtmldom: update to 1.5
> > >>
> > >> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> > >> State-Changed-By: lwhsu
> > >> State-Changed-When: Wed Jan 4 20:42:19 UTC 2012
> > >> State-Changed-Why:
> > >> Installing files with '.svn' looks a bit strange, is this necessary?
> > >>
> > >> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163818
> > >>
> > >
> > >
>
>
>
> --
> Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
> http://lwhsu.org
>
